title: Fps And Utility
description:
This mod-pack comprises of mods that will help you run your game faster as well as have quality of life mods that make game feel and look better.

It consists of quality of life mods like 
- Mini Map
- Bounding Box
- Gamma Util
and many more.
body:
Introducing the "FPS and Utility Modpack" - a meticulously crafted fabric modpack designed to optimize your Minecraft experience while providing an array of utility mods. This carefully curated collection combines performance-enhancing mods with various quality of life improvements to offer you smoother gameplay and convenient features. Running on the latest Minecraft version 1.20, this fabric modpack is tailored to meet your needs.

Vulkan FPS and Utility

[Click Here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vulkan-fps-and-utility)


FPS Boost:

1)Sodium: Replace Minecraft's default rendering engine with Sodium, a powerful performance optimization mod. It significantly improves FPS by optimizing the game's graphics pipeline while maintaining visual fidelity.

2)Iris: Working in tandem with Sodium, Iris focuses on optimizing Minecraft's lighting system. It enhances lighting calculations to improve performance and visual effects.

3)Lithium: Address performance bottlenecks related to game physics and optimizations with Lithium. This mod enhances efficiency, providing better FPS stability and reducing lag spikes.

(There are mods mods then these for this category)


Quality of Life Mods:

1)REI (Roughly Enough Items): Access comprehensive recipe information within the game using REI. This mod allows you to browse recipes, search for specific items, and even displays recipe alternatives from installed mods.

2)Inventory Tweaks: Streamline your inventory management with this mod's auto-sorting, automatic restocking, and customizable sorting rules. Keep your inventory organized and clutter-free effortlessly.

3)Xaero-Minimap: Navigate your world with ease using Xaero-Minimap. This detailed minimap mod provides real-time mapping updates, waypoint markers, and customizable settings.

4)WorldMap: Expand your mapping capabilities with the Minimap mod. It allows you to view and manage larger maps, providing a comprehensive overview of your explored Minecraft world.

5)Jade: Obtain instant information about blocks and entities with Jade. Similar to WAILA, this mod displays relevant details such as block properties, mod information, and more.

6)Mouse Tweaks: Simplify inventory tasks with intuitive mouse gestures. Move and sort items effortlessly, and perform crafting actions seamlessly.

7)AppleSkin: Keep track of your hunger level more conveniently with AppleSkin. Hover over food items to view saturation and hunger values, aiding in resource management.

8)Falling Leafs: Enhance the visual ambiance of your Minecraft world with Falling Leafs. This mod adds realistic falling leaves to trees, creating a more immersive and picturesque environment.

(There are mods mods then these for this category)


Additional Mods:

1)Alternate Current: Introduces alternative methods for generating and transmitting power in Minecraft, offering new and unique gameplay mechanics.

2)BetterHandBobbing: Improves the hand bobbing animation while walking or running in Minecraft, enhancing the visual smoothness and realism of hand movements.

3)Camera Overhaul: Enhances your camera controls and perspectives with this mod. It provides additional camera options, such as adjustable FOV (Field of View), cinematic camera movements, and more.

4)Camera Utils: Expands your camera functionalities with Camera Utils. This mod allows you to capture and save screenshots with customizable settings, control camera angles, and utilize additional camera tools.

5)Craft Presence: Elevate your multiplayer experience with Craft Presence. This mod integrates with Discord to display your Minecraft status, current activity, and in-game achievements to your friends.

6)Enhance Attack Indicator: Improves the attack indicator in Minecraft. This mod enhances the visual feedback when attacking, making it easier to time your strikes and combos.

(There are mods mods then these for this category)


Enjoy exploring the world of Minecraft with improved performance, convenient features, and enhanced visuals. This fabric modpack, designed for Minecraft version 1.20, offers an optimized and immersive experience tailored to your needs.
